style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in French. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents. On the left, a titled card headed RICECO with a caption beneath reading A SIX-STEP FORMULA FOR A PROMPT, listing six numbered rows, each a short navy bold label followed by a few rust-or-navy words: '1 ROLE — give the AI a persona', '2 INSTRUCTION — state the exact task', '3 CONTEXT — the background and audience', '4 EXAMPLES — show an ideal output', '5 CONSTRAINTS — the rules and limits', '6 OUTPUT FORMAT — how to structure the answer'. On the right, a simple cycle: a box labelled AI OUTPUT connects by arrow to a box labelled VERIFY, which connects by arrow to a box labelled TRUST. A rust return arrow loops from VERIFY back to AI OUTPUT, labelled IF IT DOES NOT CHECK OUT. Below the cycle, a small caption reads VERIFY, THEN TRUST. Calm, architectural, legible labels, spelled exactly as given. No logos, no people. On-image labels in Canadian French read: card caption 'UNE FORMULE EN SIX ÉTAPES POUR UNE REQUÊTE'; rows '1 RÔLE — donnez un persona à l'IA', '2 INSTRUCTION — énoncez la tâche exacte', '3 CONTEXTE — le contexte et l'auditoire', '4 EXEMPLES — montrez une sortie idéale', '5 CONTRAINTES — les règles et limites', '6 FORMAT DE SORTIE — comment structurer la réponse'; boxes 'SORTIE DE L'IA', 'VÉRIFIER', 'FAIRE CONFIANCE'; arrow label 'SI ÇA NE TIENT PAS'; caption 'VÉRIFIER, PUIS FAIRE CONFIANCE' (keep RICECO and TRUST as-is). All text labels in Canadian French. Match the composition of the source image exactly; only the text labels change.
composed_prompt:
Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in French. No photo realism, no people, no logos.

Subject: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents. On the left, a titled card headed RICECO with a caption beneath reading A SIX-STEP FORMULA FOR A PROMPT, listing six numbered rows, each a short navy bold label followed by a few rust-or-navy words: '1 ROLE — give the AI a persona', '2 INSTRUCTION — state the exact task', '3 CONTEXT — the background and audience', '4 EXAMPLES — show an ideal output', '5 CONSTRAINTS — the rules and limits', '6 OUTPUT FORMAT — how to structure the answer'. On the right, a simple cycle: a box labelled AI OUTPUT connects by arrow to a box labelled VERIFY, which connects by arrow to a box labelled TRUST. A rust return arrow loops from VERIFY back to AI OUTPUT, labelled IF IT DOES NOT CHECK OUT. Below the cycle, a small caption reads VERIFY, THEN TRUST. Calm, architectural, legible labels, spelled exactly as given. No logos, no people. On-image labels in Canadian French read: card caption 'UNE FORMULE EN SIX ÉTAPES POUR UNE REQUÊTE'; rows '1 RÔLE — donnez un persona à l'IA', '2 INSTRUCTION — énoncez la tâche exacte', '3 CONTEXTE — le contexte et l'auditoire', '4 EXEMPLES — montrez une sortie idéale', '5 CONTRAINTES — les règles et limites', '6 FORMAT DE SORTIE — comment structurer la réponse'; boxes 'SORTIE DE L'IA', 'VÉRIFIER', 'FAIRE CONFIANCE'; arrow label 'SI ÇA NE TIENT PAS'; caption 'VÉRIFIER, PUIS FAIRE CONFIANCE' (keep RICECO and TRUST as-is). All text labels in Canadian French. Match the composition of the source image exactly; only the text labels change.

The diagram must clearly communicate the structure described. Use crisp legible labels. No watermarks. No photo realism. Architectural diagram aesthetic.
